title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 32.210 - Compact to apply to all state and local taxes
text:
32.210.  Compact to apply to all state and local taxes. — The provisions of the compact shall apply to any tax levied by the state of Missouri or its political subdivisions.
(L. 1967 p. 102 § 2, A.L. 1974 H.B. 1291)
